description_long: This house is a modern row-style residential building featuring a combination of white and brown brick facades. The structure consists of multiple attached units, each with its own fenced backyard area, some with green lawns and wooden or metal fencing. The windows are rectangular and arranged in regular rows, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The roof is flat, with visible divisions between units and some rooftop access or utility features. The main entryways are simple, with minimal decorative elements, and are directly accessible from the front sidewalk.
description: A modern row house with white and brown brick facades, flat roof, regular window rows, and fenced backyards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, white and brown brick facades, and fenced yards.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the units and the green backyard spaces with fences.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, regular window arrangement, and a protruding rear structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced backyards and the length of the building.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush doors with minimal overhang, direct sidewalk access, and small fenced front yards.
